<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtperd (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-ngū]][[de:Holz-Pferd]][[hak:Kap-ńg]][[ja:甲午]][[ko:갑오]][[nds:Holt-Peerd]][[vi:Giáp Ngọ]][[za:Gyapngux]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-ngó͘]][[zh-yue:甲午]][[zh:甲午]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtperd (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-ngū]][[de:Holz-Pferd]][[hak:Kap-ńg]][[ja:甲午]][[ko:갑오]][[nds:Holt-Peerd]][[vi:Giáp Ngọ]][[za:Gyapngux]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-ngó͘]][[zh-yue:甲午]][[zh:甲午]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtperd (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-ngū]][[de:Holz-Pferd]][[hak:Kap-ńg]][[ja:甲午]][[ko:갑오]][[nds:Holt-Peerd]][[vi:Giáp Ngọ]][[za:Gyapngux]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-ngó͘]][[zh-yue:甲午]][[zh:甲午]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Horse|kanji=甲午|romaji=kinoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=jiǎwǔ|w=chia-wu|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ u²¹|y=gaap6 ng5|j=gaap6 ng5|ci=kaːp̚ ŋo|mc=kæp ŋo|oc-bs=kaːp ŋaʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is [[Yin Water Snake]] and the following combination is [[Yin Wood Goat]]. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin-Yang Five Elements]], the [[Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ [[Kinoe (甲)]] represents yang [[Wood (wuxing)|Wood (木)]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]’ [[Horse (zodiac)|Horse (午)]] represents yang [[Fire (wuxing)|Fire (火)]], and they interact by [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Mutual Generation]] (Wood produces Fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Wood Horse (甲午)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎwǔ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 ng5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-uma
***Onyomi 1: koubu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap o (갑오)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Ngọ

<!--
==
* Yang Wood Horse (甲午) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎwǔ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 ng5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: きのえうま (kinoe-uma)
***Onyomi: こうかのうま (kōka-no-uma)
***Onyomi: こうご (kōgo)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapo
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Ngọ

-->
==Years of Yang Wood Horse==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 34 when divided by 60 is a [[Year]] of Kōgo.
{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Kōgo'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 34|34 AD]]
* [[AD 94|94 AD]]
* [[154|154 AD]]
* [[214|214 AD]]
* [[274|274 AD]]
* [[334|334 AD]]
* [[394|394 AD]]
* [[454|454 AD]]
* [[514|514 AD]]
* [[574|574 AD]]
* [[634|634 AD]]
* [[694|694 AD]]
* [[754|754 AD]]
* [[814|814 AD]]
* [[874|874 AD]]
* [[934|934 AD]]
* [[994|994 AD]]
|
* [[1054|1054 AD]]
* [[1114|1114 AD]]
* [[1174|1174 AD]]
* [[1234|1234 AD]]
* [[1294|1294 AD]]
* [[1354|1354 AD]]
* [[1414|1414 AD]]
* [[1474|1474 AD]]
* [[1534|1534 AD]]
* [[1594|1594 AD]]
* [[1654|1654 AD]]
* [[1714|1714 AD]]
* [[1774|1774 AD]]
* [[1834|1834 AD]]
* [[1894|1894 AD]]
* [[1954|1954 AD]]
|
* [[2014|2014 AD]]
* [[2074 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2134 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2194 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2254 AD]]
* [[24th century|2314 AD]]
* [[2374 AD]]
* [[2434 AD]]
* [[2494 AD]]
* [[2554 AD]]
* [[2614 AD]]
* [[2674 AD]]
* [[2734 AD]]
* [[2794 AD]]
* [[2854 AD]]
* [[2914 AD]]
* [[2974 AD]]
|}

=== Events ===
* In [[Meiji era]] 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.

==Months of Yang Wood Horse==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are [[Kanoto (辛)]] or [[Hinoe (丙)]]), the month of [[May]] becomes the [[Month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[Mangzhong]] until the day before [[Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Wood Horse==
The [[Senjitsu]] for a Kōgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of [[Tenitsu-shin]].

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Bó͘-chîn]]
[[zh-yue:戊戌]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Wood Horse|qq=ja|甲午|version=98658269|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Tsuch-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Erd-Hundvi]]
[[de:Yang Wood Horse]]

[[ja:甲午]]

[[zh:甲午]]
[[ko:갑오]]
[[fr:Cheval de bois]]
[[de:Holz-Pferd]]

[[af:Aardehond (astrologie)]]
[[de:Erde-Hundeen]]
[[en:Earth Dog]]
[[fr:Chien de terreboishak]]
[[it:Tsu-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:무술 (간지)]]
[[vi:Mậu Tuất]]
[[za:Mouzceij]]
[[zh:戊戌]]
[[ar:Yang Wood Horse]]

<!--Yang Wood Horse--><!--Yang Wood Horse-->


<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Houtperd (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gák-ngū]]
[[hak:Kap-ńg]]
[[nds:Holt-Peerd]]
[[vi:Giáp Ngọ]]
[[za:Gyapngux]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kap-ngó͘]]
[[zh-yue:甲午]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Houtperd (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gák-ngū]]
[[hak:Kap-ńg]]
[[nds:Holt-Peerd]]
[[vi:Giáp Ngọ]]
[[za:Gyapngux]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kap-ngó͘]]
[[zh-yue:甲午]]
{{wikidata link|Q904930}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
